news-global-econ.title: Trump Says U.S. Will Withdraw 'A Lot' More Than 5,000 Troops From Germany
news-global-econ.description:
President Donald Trump has said that far more troop reductions are in the offing after the Pentagon announced on Friday that some 5,000 U.S. soldiers would be withdrawn from bases in Germany over the coming year.

news-global-econ.title: New RBI rules for shadow banks may put Tata Sons IPO on radar
news-global-econ.description: The Reserve Bank of India this week said shadow lenders that are accepting money from associates and group entities will be counted as having indirect access to public funds

news-global-soc.title: 2 US service members missing in Morocco after multinational military exercise, search underway
news-global-soc.description: A search-and-rescue effort is underway after two U.S. service members went missing during the African Lion military exercise in southwestern Morocco.

news-global-soc.title: Nvidia’s push into physical AI sparks rally in Asian partners
news-global-soc.description: Nvidia's expansion into physical AI boosts Asian partners, driving stock rallies and highlighting the region's critical role in AI supply chains.

news-global-soc.description: Fox News Digital reviews 20th Century Studios' "The Devil Wears Prada 2" starring Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Stanley Tucci and Emily Blunt. Directed by David Frankel.
